Sri Rukmini Satyabhama Sametha
Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple

✦   DIVYA KSHETRAM   ✦

About the Temple

✦   DIVYA KSHETRAM   ✦

Sri Rukmini Satyabhama Sametha Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple

This divine temple enshrines Lord Venugopala Swamy — the cosmic flutist, an incarnation of Lord Sri Krishna — alongside his divine consorts Goddess Rukmini and Goddess Satyabhama. The combined presence of the divine trinity symbolizes the perfect balance of love, strength, and divine grace.

Built following the sacred traditions of the Tennacharya Sampradaya under the Pancharathra Agama Shastra, the temple serves as a spiritual powerhouse where devotees seek blessings for health, prosperity, progeny, marriage, and liberation.

✦

The Presiding Deities

Principal Deity

Sri Venugopala Swamy

The divine form of Lord Krishna playing his enchanting flute. Venugopala represents cosmic love, beauty, and the universal call of the soul towards the divine. Devotees worship him for progeny, happiness, and spiritual liberation.

Incarnation of Mahalakshmi

Sri Rukmini Devi

The divine consort of Lord Krishna, Rukmini Devi, is the embodiment of Mahalakshmi. She bestows prosperity, marital harmony, and grace. The annual Rukmini Kalyanam ceremony is the most celebrated event at the temple.

Incarnation of Bhoodevi

Sri Satyabhama Devi

The second consort of Lord Krishna, Satyabhama Devi is the incarnation of Bhoodevi — the earth goddess. She represents courage, assertiveness, and strength. Her presence balances the energy of the divine.

✦

Temple Tradition & Sampradaya

Tradition
Tennacharya Sampradaya
Agama
Pancharathra Agama Shastra
Deity Form
Santana Venugopala Swamy
Primary Veda
Yajur Veda

Temple Significance

👶

Santana Prapti

Devotees seek blessings for progeny and child welfare through Sri Krishna Vratham

💍

Marriage Blessings

Young devotees worship to find suitable life partners. Rukmini Kalyanam is a powerful remedy for delayed marriages.

🌿

Health & Wellbeing

Regular darshan and Abhishekam at the temple is believed to cure ailments and bring mental peace

✨

Moksha

The Vaikunta Ekadasi Uttara Dwara Darshan is believed to cleanse all sins and lead to liberation

ॐ

Sri Rukmini Satyabhama Sametha
Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple

A divine abode of Lord Venugopala Swamy, Goddess Rukmini, and Goddess Satyabhama — blessing all devotees with love, grace, and prosperity.
